task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the imaging plan to read the requirements.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of '~/Documents/imaging_plan.txt'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent selected the correct target (NGC 7000) in the planetarium or capture software.
task_completion.visual_evidence: KStars or Ekos GUI showing 'NGC 7000' as the target, or coordinates matching RA ~20h58m and Dec ~+44°20'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent configured the capture sequence for the required narrowband filters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Ekos capture module (or similar sequence planner) showing a queue with Ha, OIII, and SII filters, set to capture at least 5 frames per filter.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully executed the sequence and captured the FITS files.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Ekos capture module showing completed progress, or a file manager/terminal showing FITS files populated in '/home/ga/Images/ngc7000/narrowband'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent produced and saved the final SHO composite image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal, or image viewer showing the file 'composite_sho.png' successfully saved in '/home/ga/Images/ngc7000/'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the actual KStars/Ekos application to perform the capture sequence.
integrity.visual_evidence: The KStars/Ekos GUI is visible in the screenshots and actively interacted with, rather than the agent mocking the FITS files via terminal commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent genuinely processed the FITS files into a composite image.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of an image processing tool (like Siril, GIMP) or a Python script being executed to combine the Ha, OIII, and SII channels, rather than downloading a pre-existing image.

integrity.description: Verify the final composite image is a legitimate image file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'composite_sho.png' file displays a valid image thumbnail in the file manager or is shown successfully opened in an image viewer.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target: NGC 7000 (North America Nebula) at RA 20.979h (20:58:47), Dec 44.334° (+44:19:48). Required filters: Ha (slot 5), OIII (slot 6), SII (slot 4). Minimum 5 FITS frames per filter. Output composite must be saved to '/home/ga/Images/ngc7000/composite_sho.png'. Imaging plan is located at '/home/ga/Documents/imaging_plan.txt'.
